desc: Command: Creates a reflected ceiling plan view on a target level with optional scope box and template.
summary: Command: Creates a reflected ceiling plan view on a target level with optional scope box and template. Delegates to CreateReflectedCeilingPlan.GetAll for the actual view creation. Executable via execute_command (orchestrator) — not an MCP read-only tool. Called by SheetSetUpCommand during automated sheet setup. Related: CreateFloorplanCommand for floor plans.
usecase: User wants to create an RCP/ceiling plan view for a level. User is setting up views during sheet setup workflow.
notfor: Creating floor plans (use CreateFloorplanCommand). Creating section views (use CreateSectionFromGridlineCommand).
precondition: Active document must be open. Target level must exist in the model.
postcondition: A new ViewPlan (ReflectedCeilingPlan) is created on the given level with optional scope box and template applied.

config_inputs.name: levelName
config_inputs.description: Target level name (required if levelId not provided).

config_inputs.name: scopeBoxName
config_inputs.description: Optional scope box name to apply.

outputs.name: Result
outputs.description: Created view id, name, level, type.

preprompts: Setting up a new RCP view...
failureprompts: Could not create reflected ceiling plan: {error}
